title: Another pickaxe
description: Create a pickaxe that you couldn't even think of before!
body:
There are many picks in Minecraft, but they are all monotonous. Notched pickaxe is ready to fix the situation! The mod will add new types of picks with different abilities. There are both banal 3-by-3 pickaxes, as well as completely new types, such as a pickaxe with torches, a tasty pickaxe, an explosive pickaxe and a pickaxe that returns you to the upper world.

If you speak Russian, then you can join my discord server, where you can find news on my projects, chat with me and my team, or just find friends. However, if you do not speak Russian, this does not mean that you are not allowed on my discord server. You can also join, I will be glad to see everyone. In addition, all important news is duplicated into English, so you do not need to translate the text.
